<!-- Thank you for contributing to NuScope. -->

# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] I restored local tools and dependencies
- [ ] I ran `dotnet csharpier check .`
- [ ] I ran `dotnet build --configuration Release --no-restore`
- [ ] I ran `dotnet test --configuration Release --no-build --no-restore`

## Notes

Include any follow-up work, tradeoffs, or context reviewers should know.
